reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 3400.0 (5.3x ATR). 2. SL Dist: 1600.0 (Base 1.8x + Offset 0.7x for POC/Liquidity). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 2.12. 4. Regime: RANGING/DISTRIBUTION. 5. Logic: Price has confirmed 'Acceptance Below Value' by consolidating under the POC (71169) following a 74k liquidity sweep. The breakdown of the 15m wedge on increasing volume suggests the path of least resistance is toward the VAL (66200). We target the high-volume node near 67k, with a stop above the POC to invalidate the bearish thesis.
reasoning_zh: 1. TP 距离: 3400.0 (5.3x ATR)。2. SL 距离: 1600.0 (2.5x ATR)。3. 盈亏比: 2.12。4. 市场环境: 震荡/派发。5. 逻辑: 价格在 74k 扫损后未能站稳 POC (71169)，目前在 POC 下方缩量整理，确认了“价值区下方承接” (Acceptance Below Value)。15分钟周期的楔形下破预示着空头动能占优。下方至 VAL (66200) 之间存在低成交量真空区，价格极易向价值区下沿回归。止损设于 POC 上方以应对假突破。
